blood_feast.long: Passive. Each time this unit destroys a Human model, it gains +1 Blood Feast die. Blood Feast dice persist. At the start of this unit's activation, it may add all Blood Feast dice to ONE chosen pool for that activation: attack, defense, or interaction.

klowna_spawn.short: Spawns from the wreck, not normal deployment.
klowna_spawn.long: Passive. Does not deploy normally. At the start of Round 2 (or scenario-defined), place this unit in base contact with the Clown Car/Wagon Wreck marker.

twin_maw.long: Passive. When this unit makes a melee attack, it may split its attack between up to two targets in base contact (declare split before rolling).

two_heads.long: Passive. At the start of each activation, roll 1d6: 1-2 Frenzy (must Charge nearest unit), 3-4 Normal, 5-6 Mockery (all enemies within 6" must test Morale).

thyr_devourer.short: Consume a Thyr Crystal Cache to trigger a Thyr Mutation.
thyr_devourer.long: Main Action. If this unit is in base contact with a Thyr Crystal Cache, it may consume it. Remove the Cache from play. Immediately resolve this unit's Thyr Mutation ability (such as Thyr Frenzy, Titan Emergence, etc.). Unless stated otherwise, a unit may only consume one Cache per game (see Thyr Overload).

thyr_overload.short: This unit may only consume one Thyr Cache per game.
thyr_overload.long: Passive. This unit may not consume more than one Thyr Crystal Cache per game, even if it has multiple Thyr Mutation abilities. If an effect would cause it to consume an additional Cache, the effect fails and the Cache remains in play.

thyr_titan_emergence.short: After consuming Thyr, transform into a Titan form.
thyr_titan_emergence.long: Trigger. After this unit consumes a Thyr Crystal Cache, replace it with its Titan form (specified on the unit card or scenario). The Titan deploys in the same position, facing the same direction, with full Health/Quality as defined. Any conditions affecting the original unit end unless the scenario says otherwise.

thyr_frenzy.short: After consuming Thyr, become enraged and more lethal.
thyr_frenzy.long: Trigger. After this unit consumes a Thyr Crystal Cache, it gains +1 Quality and gains Brutal Impact for the remainder of the game. It also becomes CannotBeBefriended for the remainder of the game (existing Befriend status immediately ends).

thyr_regeneration.short: After consuming Thyr, become harder to kill.
thyr_regeneration.long: Trigger. After this unit consumes a Thyr Crystal Cache, it gains Regeneration and Tougher for the remainder of the game.

thyr_possession.short: After consuming Thyr, become possessed and terrifying.
thyr_possession.long: Trigger. After this unit consumes a Thyr Crystal Cache, it becomes CannotBeBefriended for the remainder of the game and gains Savage Fear for the remainder of the game.

thyr_spawn.short: After consuming Thyr, create a Spawn.
thyr_spawn.long: Trigger. After this unit consumes a Thyr Crystal Cache, place one Spawn unit within 3" of this unit (in coherency if relevant). Spawn must be a defined unit in the Monsters faction list or the scenario's Spawn table. If no legal placement exists, the Spawn is not created.

thyr_mutation.short: After consuming Thyr, gain a random mutation.
thyr_mutation.long: Trigger. After this unit consumes a Thyr Crystal Cache, roll 1d6 and apply one result for the remainder of the game: 1–2: Gain Brutal Impact. 3: Gain Savage Impact. 4: Gain Tougher. 5–6: Gain Regeneration. If the unit already has the rolled mutation, reroll until it gains a new one.

thyr_beacon.short: Gain bonuses while near Thyr (without consuming it).
thyr_beacon.long: Passive. While this unit is within 6" of a Thyr Crystal Cache, it gains +1 die on all Quality checks and gains Fear (or increases Fear by one tier, if it already has Fear). This does not consume the Cache.

thyr_guardian.long: Passive. While this unit is within 6" of a Thyr Crystal, it gains +1 Quality on melee attacks.

thyr_sated.short: After consuming Thyr, become sluggish but durable.
thyr_sated.long: Trigger. After this unit consumes a Thyr Crystal Cache, it gains Tougher and Tough (stacking by tier only; keep the highest tier), but its Move is reduced by 2" for the remainder of the game (minimum Move 2").

thyr_lure.short: This unit is drawn to Thyr and moves faster toward it.
thyr_lure.long: Passive. If this unit begins its activation and a Thyr Crystal Cache is on the table, it gains +2" Move during this activation if it ends its activation closer to the nearest Cache than it began.
